name: Consult Playbook
description:
Retrieve full details for a playbook/workflow. Returns the sequence of phases and steps, which agents handle each step, input/output artifacts, completion criteria, and quality checkpoints. Use this to understand how to orchestrate a workflow.

Pattern: menu+consult - prompt includes summary menu, this tool provides full details on demand.

playbook_id.description: The ID of the playbook to retrieve (e.g., 'story_spark', 'scene_weave'). If omitted, lists all available playbooks.

triggers.description: Conditions that should trigger this playbook

phases.description: Ordered list of phases with steps, agents, and criteria

summary.description: Human-readable summary of the entire workflow

examples.description: Get full details for the Story Spark workflow
